title: Arcreate
description: A fun little modpack to play with a small group of friends!
body:
A small, friendly vanilla+ modpack built around the creative power of the Create mod. Perfect for playing with friends, it keeps the classic Minecraft experience intact while adding fun mechanical and building tools to spark your imagination. Explore, build, and automate together in a relaxed world designed for creativity and collaboration—no overwhelming extras, just pure, enjoyable gameplay.

_All included mods and resource packs remain under their original licenses. I do not claim ownership over any individual mod/resource pack._
